channels.name: StatQuest with Josh Starmer
channels.description: Crystal-clear explanations of stats and ML. Famous 'BAM!'. Start here if maths feels scary.

channels.name: 3Blue1Brown
channels.description: Beautiful visual math. The neural networks series is iconic.

channels.name: Andrew Ng — DeepLearning.AI
channels.description: Co-founder of Coursera ML. Foundational and well-structured.

channels.name: Sentdex
channels.description: Hands-on Python ML tutorials, from basics to advanced projects.

channels.name: Two Minute Papers
channels.description: Latest AI research papers explained in under 5 minutes. Great for staying current.

channels.name: Yannic Kilcher
channels.description: Deep paper walkthroughs. Great for understanding state-of-the-art research.

channels.name: Andrej Karpathy
channels.description: Ex-OpenAI/Tesla. Builds GPT from scratch. The best YouTube series on transformers, period.

channels.name: Aladdin Persson
channels.description: PyTorch and TensorFlow from-scratch implementations. Excellent for hands-on learners.

channels.name: Lex Fridman
channels.description: Long-form interviews with AI pioneers. Great for understanding the field's direction.

channels.name: AI Engineer
channels.description: Conference talks on building production LLM apps. RAG, agents, evals.

channels.name: James Briggs
channels.description: LangChain, vector DBs, RAG pipelines. Hands-on tutorials with code.

channels.name: AssemblyAI
channels.description: Modern AI applications — speech, LLMs, multimodal.

channels.name: AI Anytime
channels.description: End-to-end GenAI projects with deployment. Great portfolio inspiration.

channels.name: Greg Kamradt (Data Indy)
channels.description: LangChain tutorials, embeddings, RAG patterns.

channels.name: Ken Jee
channels.description: Data science career advice, portfolio projects, interview prep.

channels.name: Krish Naik
channels.description: Full DS/ML/AI courses in Hindi & English. Beginner-friendly.

channels.name: Alex The Analyst
channels.description: Data analyst roadmap, SQL, Tableau, Power BI portfolio projects.

channels.name: Tina Huang
channels.description: Ex-Meta DS. Career advice, interview prep, productivity for tech workers.

channels.name: Luke Barousse
channels.description: Data job market analysis with real data. Eye-opening salary and skills insights.

channels.name: Emma Ding (Data Interview Pro)
channels.description: Ex-Airbnb DS. Behavioral, SQL, product sense, and case interview prep.

channels.name: Mahesh Huddar
channels.description: ML algorithm tutorials with worked examples. Great for interview brush-up.

channels.name: NeetCode
channels.description: Best YouTube channel for coding interview prep. LeetCode patterns explained clearly.

channels.name: Exponent
channels.description: Mock interviews for PM, DS, ML engineer roles at FAANG companies.

channels.name: Khan Academy
channels.description: Solid foundations in calculus, linear algebra, probability.

channels.name: MIT OpenCourseWare
channels.description: Full MIT courses. Gilbert Strang's linear algebra is a classic.

channels.name: Brandon Foltz
channels.description: Statistics 101 series. Patient, clear, gap-free.

channels.name: DataTalksClub
channels.description: Free MLOps Zoomcamp, real-time ML, data engineering. Free, high-quality cohorts.

channels.name: MLOps Community
channels.description: Talks from practitioners shipping ML in production at scale.

channels.name: ArjanCodes
channels.description: Python software engineering — design patterns, clean code, FastAPI. Levels up your code quality.

free_courses.name: Fast.ai — Practical Deep Learning
free_courses.description: Top-down approach. Build state-of-the-art models in week 1.

free_courses.name: Andrew Ng's ML Specialization (Coursera audit)
free_courses.description: The classic foundational ML course. Free if you audit.

free_courses.name: CS50's Intro to AI with Python (Harvard)
free_courses.description: Free Harvard course. Search, knowledge, ML, neural nets, NLP.

free_courses.name: Hugging Face NLP Course
free_courses.description: Free, hands-on transformers and NLP using HF libraries.

free_courses.name: MLOps Zoomcamp (DataTalksClub)
free_courses.description: Free 9-week MLOps course. Experiment tracking, orchestration, deployment, monitoring.

free_courses.name: DeepLearning.AI Short Courses
free_courses.description: 1-2 hour focused courses on LLMs, RAG, agents — usually free.

free_courses.name: Full Stack Deep Learning
free_courses.description: How to ship ML systems. Free lecture series.
